response.justification: The candidate's resume shows extensive experience in web, mobile, and embedded systems development, but lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of strong C++ development experience on Windows platforms required for this role. While there is some C/C++ exposure (e.g., National Instruments), the majority of their career has been focused on other languages like JavaScript, TypeScript, D, and Node.js, which does not align with the core technical requirements. Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, nor any mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with diverse language experience (C, C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, D, etc.)
Experience with low-latency systems and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby media)
Proven ability to work in agile environments and contribute to CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Insufficient C++ development experience on Windows platforms (mandatory requirement not met)
No demonstrated domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking
Lack of experience with SQL Server or Oracle (mentioned as mandatory)
